subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy letter was received. Thou hadst written that thou art occupied with service to the friends. How excellent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی مکتوب واصل گردید مرقوم نموده بودی که بخدمت یاران مشغولی زهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
